response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video and detected two distinct song performances by VTuber Amani Kanata.
2. Song 1 detected: 'Peace Sign' (ピースサイン). On-screen text identifies composer Kenshi Yonezu. Performer is Amani Kanata.
3. Song 2 detected: 'That's Why I Gave Up on Music' (だから僕は音楽を辞めた). On-screen text identifies composer n-buna. Performer is Amani Kanata.
4. Used search tool to fetch official lyrics for both songs using composer names, as per instructions.
5. Constructed the JSON array, properly separating the intro, two song performances, and the bridge, ensuring correct timestamps and escaped lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video is a concert performance featuring VTuber Amani Kanata, who performs two Japanese songs: 'Peace Sign' by Kenshi Yonezu and 'That's Why I Gave Up on Music' by n-buna.

scenes.description: The video opens with instrumental music and Amani Kanata on stage. No vocal singing.
Amani Kanata performs 'Peace Sign'. Text 'ピースサイン' and '作詞・作曲: 米津玄師' appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
いつか僕らの上をスレスレに
通り過ぎていったあの飛行機を
不思議なくらいに憶えてる
意味もないのに何故か
不甲斐なくて泣いた日の夜に
ただ強くなりたいと願ってた
そのために必要な勇気を
探し求めていた
殘酷な運命が
定まっているとして
それがいつの日か
僕の前に現れるとして
ただ一瞬この一瞬
息ができるなら
どうでもいいと思えた
その心を
もう一度遠くへ行け
遠くへ行けと
僕の中で誰かが歌う
どうしようもないほど熱烈に
目を腫らした君が二度と
悲しまないように笑える
そんなヒーローになるための歌
さらば掲げろピースサイン
転がっていくストーリーを
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I still remember that airplane that once grazed the sky above us
For no reason at all, it's stuck in my mind
On the night I cried because I was so useless
I was searching for the courage needed to become stronger
Even if a cruel fate is already decided
Even if it appears before me someday
As long as I can breathe for this one moment
I thought that was enough
Go further, go further
Someone in my heart is singing
So passionately that I can't help it
So you, with your swollen eyes, will never have to be sad again
This is a song to become that kind of hero
So raise your peace sign
And let the story roll on

scenes.description: Amani Kanata performs 'That's Why I Gave Up on Music'. Text 'だから僕は音楽を辞めた' and '作詞・作曲: n-buna' appears on screen.
scenes.song_title: That's Why I Gave Up on Music
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
考えたってわからないし
青空の下、君を待った
風が吹いた正午、昼下がりを抜け出す想像
進め方教わらないんだよ
君の目を見た
何も言えず僕は歩いた
考えたってわからないし
青春なんてつまらないし
辞めた筈のピアノ、机を弾く癖が抜けない
ねぇ、将来何してるだろうね
音楽はしてないといいね
困らないでよ
心の中に一つ線を引いても
どうしても消えなかった
今更なんだから
なぁ、もう思い出すな
間違ってるんだよ
わかってないよ、あんたら人間も
本当も愛も世界も苦しさも人生もどうでもいいよ
正しいかどうか知りたいのだって防衛本能だ
考えたんだ
あんたのせいだ
考えたってわからないが、本当に年老いたくないんだ
いつか死んだらって思うだけで胸が空っぽになるんだ
将来何してるだろうって
大人になったらわかったよ
何もしてないさ
幸せな顔した人が憎いのはどう割り切ったらいいんだ
満たされない頭の奥の化け物みたいな劣等感
間違ってないよ
なぁ、何だかんだあんたら人間だ
愛も救いも優しさも根拠がないなんて気味が悪いよ
ラブソングなんかが痛いのだって防衛本能だ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I can't understand it even if I think about it
I waited for you under the blue sky
Imagining escaping the afternoon, the noon when the wind blew
They didn't teach me how to move forward
I looked into your eyes
I couldn't say anything and just walked on
I can't understand it even if I think about it
Youth is boring after all
I can't shake off the habit of playing the piano I should have quit, on my desk
Hey, I wonder what you'll be doing in the future
I hope you're not doing music
Don't trouble me
Even if I drew a line in my heart
I couldn't erase it no matter what
It's too late now
Hey, don't remember it anymore
It's wrong
You don't understand, even you humans
Truth, love, the world, suffering, and life, none of it matters
Wanting to know if it's correct is just a defense mechanism
I thought about it
It's your fault
I don't understand even if I think about it, but I really don't want to get old
Just thinking about dying someday makes my chest feel empty
I wonder what I'll be doing in the future
When I became an adult, I understood
I'm not doing anything
Why should I accept that I hate people with happy faces
An inferiority complex like a monster deep in my unsatisfied head
It's not wrong
Hey, you humans after all
Love, salvation, kindness, it's creepy that there's no basis for it
Even love songs being painful is a defense mechanism
